iteration_1_baseline.description: Original verbose skill (297 lines) with 10 supporting files
iteration_1_baseline.notes: High variance. Run 2 failed: bsearch missing closing brace, race couldn't parse tool args (malformed JSON from context overload)

iteration_2_trimmed.description: Removed all supporting files, shortened SKILL.md to ~30 lines with concise instructions and common patterns
iteration_2_trimmed.notes: bsearch now consistent. Race still failing 2/3 - model uses incorrect 'await lock' pattern instead of promise chain mutex

iteration_3_better_mutex.description: Added explicit queue-based mutex example and warning that await-lock pattern doesn't work

iteration_4_confirmation.notes: Confirmed: 11/12 runs at 100/100 across iterations 3-4 (one race failure in iteration 3b at 20/100)

changes_made: Removed 10 supporting files (root-cause-tracing.md, defense-in-depth.md, condition-based-waiting.md, condition-based-waiting-example.ts, find-polluter.sh, test-pressure-1/2/3.md, test-academic.md, CREATION-LOG.md) that polluted the workspace and confused the model
Reduced SKILL.md from 297 lines to ~45 lines focused on actionable steps
Added explicit correct mutex pattern (promise chain queue) for race condition fixes
Added explicit warning against incorrect 'await lock' anti-pattern
Added reminder to write COMPLETE file content including closing braces
